subject: One conversation worth having
body:
Dear Dr. Karen White,

I am reaching out regarding professional website development services for Bright Smile Orthodontics.

Your business maintains 145 reviews, 4.9 stars on Google. A professional website would enhance your online visibility and customer acquisition capabilities.

I specialize in developing professional websites for local businesses, including:

- Professional design and development
- Mobile optimization
- Search engine visibility
- Online customer engagement features

Timeline: 3 business days
Investment: $500

I would be pleased to discuss how this service could benefit Bright Smile Orthodontics.

Best regards,
Andy
